title: Pan-Seared Snapper with Stir Fry Sauce
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make pan-seared snapper dish served with a creamy stir fry sauce. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the snapper fillets with salt and pepper. Dust with flour, shaking off excess.
Add the snapper to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Remove the snapper from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil. Add the chopped onion and bell pepper and cook until tender.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the creamy stir fry sauce and bring to a simmer.
Return the snapper to the skillet and spoon some of the stir fry sauce over the top.
Serve the snapper with additional stir fry sauce on the side, if desired.
